---
title: "Day 09 - "Wealth"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(ggtext)
library(ggview)
# set view defaults
mywidth = 6
myheight = 8
mydpi = 300
```

```{r}
# Read and combine data
bra_2023 <- read_csv("./data/BRA-punc-2023.csv") |> mutate(region = "BRA", year = 2023)
bra_2024 <- read_csv("./data/BRA-punc-2024.csv") |> mutate(region = "BRA", year = 2024)
eur_2023 <- read_csv("./data/EUR-punc-2023.csv") |> mutate(region = "EUR", year = 2023)
eur_2024 <- read_csv("./data/EUR-punc-2024.csv") |> mutate(region = "EUR", year = 2024)

all_data <- bind_rows(bra_2023, bra_2024, eur_2023, eur_2024)

# Convert bin columns to long format and calculate delay contributions
# Map each bin to its midpoint delay value
bin_midpoints <- tribble(
  ~bin, ~delay_minutes,
  "(-INF,-60]", -70,     # Assume early arrivals average -70 min
  "(-60,-55]", -57.5,
  "(-55,-50]", -52.5,
  "(-50,-45]", -47.5,
  "(-45,-40]", -42.5,
  "(-40,-35]", -37.5,
  "(-35,-30]", -32.5,
  "(-30,-25]", -27.5,
  "(-25,-20]", -22.5,
  "(-20,-15]", -17.5,
  "(-15,-10]", -12.5,
  "(-10,-5]", -7.5,
  "(-5,0]", -2.5,
  "(0,5)", 2.5,
  "[5,10)", 7.5,
  "[10,15)", 12.5,
  "[15,20)", 17.5,
  "[20,25)", 22.5,
  "[25,30)", 27.5,
  "[30,35)", 32.5,
  "[35,40)", 37.5,
  "[40,45)", 42.5,
  "[45,50)", 47.5,
  "[50,55)", 52.5,
  "[55,60)", 57.5,
  "[60,INF)", 70        # Assume extreme delays average 70 min
)

# Reshape and calculate total delay per observation
delay_data <- all_data |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^\\(|^\\["),  # All delay bin columns
    names_to = "bin",
    values_to = "n_flights"
  ) |>
  left_join(bin_midpoints, by = "bin") |>
  # Calculate total delay for this bin (flights × midpoint delay)
  mutate(
    total_delay = n_flights * delay_minutes,
    # Only count positive delays for inequality analysis
    positive_delay = if_else(delay_minutes > 0, total_delay, 0),
    positive_flights = if_else(delay_minutes > 0, n_flights, 0)
  ) |>
  # Aggregate back to airport-date-phase level
  group_by(APT, DATE, PHASE, region, year) |>
  summarise(
    total_delay_min = sum(positive_delay, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_delayed_flights = sum(positive_flights, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_total_flights = sum(n_flights, na.rm = TRUE),  # Count entries instead of N_VALID
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(total_delay_min > 0, n_delayed_flights > 0)  # Only observations with actual delays
```

```{r}
# Prepare Lorenz curve data - organise by year
lorenz_data <- delay_data |>
  group_by(region, year) |>
  arrange(total_delay_min) |>
  mutate(
    # Cumulative share of observations (airport-day-phase combinations)
    cum_obs_pct = row_number() / n() * 100,
    # Cumulative share of total delay
    cum_delay_pct = cumsum(total_delay_min) / sum(total_delay_min) * 100
  ) |>
  ungroup()

# Calculate Gini coefficient ------------- helper function
calculate_gini <- function(data) {
  x <- data$total_delay_min
  n <- length(x)
  x_sorted <- sort(x)
  2 * sum((1:n) * x_sorted) / (n * sum(x_sorted)) - (n + 1) / n
}

gini_values <- lorenz_data |>
  group_by(region, year) |>
  reframe(
    gini = calculate_gini(cur_data()),
    total_delay_hours = sum(total_delay_min) / 60,
    n_obs = n()
  )

print(gini_values)

# Find 80/20 points
pareto_points <- lorenz_data |>
  group_by(region) |>
  slice_min(abs(cum_obs_pct - 20), n = 1) |>
  select(region, cum_obs_pct, cum_delay_pct)

print(pareto_points)
```
```{r}
# Create region-year combination for plotting
lorenz_data <- lorenz_data |>
  mutate(region_year = paste0(region, " ", year))

# Create the plot
bra_eur_colours <- c(BRA = "#52854C", EUR = "#4E84C4")

our_title <- "Chart-Challenge Day 09 – **DELAY INEQUALITY**<br>Are delays concentrated or widespread?"
our_sub <- "Lorenz curve showing how delay is distributed across airport-day observations. The further from the diagonal, the more inequality."
our_caption <- paste0(
  "Gini coefficient: Brazil = ", round(gini_values$gini[gini_values$region == "BRA"], 3),
  ", Europe = ", round(gini_values$gini[gini_values$region == "EUR"], 3),
  "<br>Higher Gini = more concentrated delays (few bad days account for most delay).",
  "<br>DECEA Performance Section & EUROCONTROL PRU | Data: 2023-2024"
)


ggplot(lorenz_data, aes(x = cum_obs_pct, y = cum_delay_pct, color = region)) +
  
  # Perfect equality line (45 degree)
  geom_abline(
    intercept = 0, slope = 1, 
    linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 85, y = 80, 
    label = "Perfect equality\n(all days equal delay)", 
    color = "gray40", size = 3, hjust = 0.5, fontface = "italic"
  ) +
  
  # Lorenz curves
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  # 80/20 points
  geom_point(
    data = pareto_points,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = pareto_points,
    aes(label = paste0(round(cum_delay_pct, 0), "% of delay")),
    nudge_y = -5,
    size = 3.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Vertical line at 20%
  geom_vline(xintercept = 20, linetype = "dotted", color = "gray60", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Region",
    values = bra_eur_colours,
    labels = c(BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe")
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() +
  
  labs(
    title = our_title,
    subtitle = our_sub,
    x = "Cumulative share of airport-day observations (%)",
    y = "Cumulative share of total delay (%)",
    caption = our_caption
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_textbox_simple(
      size = rel(1.4), 
      margin = margin(t = 10, b = 10)
    ),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(
      margin = margin(b = 20)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(
      margin = margin(t = 15, b = 10),
      size = rel(0.85)
    ),
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.position.inside = c(0.2, 0.85),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 20, b = 10, l = 20)
  ) +
  
  canvas(width = mywidth, height = myheight, unit = "in", dpi = mydpi)
```

Mutli-annual

```{r}
# Updated color scheme for 4 lines
region_year_colours <- c(
  "BRA 2023" = "#52854C",
  "BRA 2024" = "#7FB069",  # Lighter green
  "EUR 2023" = "#4E84C4",
  "EUR 2024" = "#7BA3D8"   # Lighter blue
)

# Build caption with year-specific Gini values
gini_text <- gini_values |>
  mutate(label = paste0(region, " ", year, " = ", round(gini, 3))) |>
  pull(label) |>
  paste(collapse = ", ")

our_caption <- paste0(
  "Gini coefficient: ", gini_text,
  "<br>Higher Gini = more concentrated delays (few bad days account for most delay).",
  "<br>DECEA Performance Section & EUROCONTROL PRU"
)

# Plot with year comparison
ggplot(lorenz_data, aes(x = cum_obs_pct, y = cum_delay_pct, color = region_year)) +
  geom_abline(
    intercept = 0, slope = 1, 
    linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 85, y = 80, 
    label = "Perfect equality", 
    color = "gray40", size = 3, hjust = 0.5, fontface = "italic"
  ) +
  
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(year)), linewidth = 1) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Region & Year",
    values = region_year_colours
  ) +
  
  scale_linetype_manual(
    name = "Year",
    values = c("2023" = "solid", "2024" = "dashed")
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() +
  
  labs(
    title = "Chart-Challenge Day 09 – **DELAY INEQUALITY**<br>Year-over-year comparison: 2023 vs 2024",
    subtitle = "Has delay concentration changed? Curves shifting toward the diagonal indicate more evenly distributed delays.",
    x = "Cumulative share of airport-day observations (%)",
    y = "Cumulative share of total delay (%)",
    caption = our_caption
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_textbox_simple(
      size = rel(1.4), 
      margin = margin(t = 10, b = 10)
    ),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(
      margin = margin(b = 20)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(
      margin = margin(t = 15, b = 10),
      size = rel(0.85)
    ),
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.position.inside = c(0.2, 0.8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 20, b = 10, l = 20)
  ) +
  canvas(width = mywidth, height = myheight, unit = "in", dpi = mydpi)
```

Alternatively, faceted view (might be clearer):

```{r}

ggplot(lorenz_data, aes(x = cum_obs_pct, y = cum_delay_pct, color = region)) +
  geom_abline(
    intercept = 0, slope = 1, 
    linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 2) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Region",
    values = bra_eur_colours,
    labels = c(BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe")
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 25),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 25),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() +
  
  labs(
    title = "Chart-Challenge Day 09 – **DELAY INEQUALITY**<br>Brazil vs Europe: 2023 vs 2024",
    subtitle = "Lorenz curves showing concentration of delays across airport-day observations",
    x = "Cumulative share of observations (%)",
    y = "Cumulative share of delay (%)",
    caption = our_caption
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_textbox_simple(size = rel(1.4), margin = margin(b = 10)),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(margin = margin(b = 15)),
    plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(margin = margin(t = 15)),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.1)),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  canvas(width = mywidth, height = myheight, unit = "in", dpi = mydpi)


```
